intentional_test_features: Found unresponsive with pinpoint pupils, cyanosis, and severe respiratory depression, with empty pill bottles nearby — tests recognition of an opioid overdose toxidrome requiring immediate 000 dispatch and naloxone if available
This is a bystander (parent)-reported case with an unconscious patient — tests correct prioritisation of immediate airway/breathing support and naloxone administration guidance over history-taking
Tests recognition that naloxone's effect is shorter-lived than many opioids, so re-sedation is a real risk requiring continued monitoring even after initial improvement

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
